title: Multi-File Bug Regression Fix
prompt:
You are debugging a regression in a TypeScript project. A recent refactor of the authentication module introduced a bug where user sessions are not properly invalidated on logout. The issue spans across 3 files: auth/session.ts (session management), middleware/auth-guard.ts (request validation), and api/logout.ts (logout handler).

Diagnose the likely root cause considering: stale token references, middleware execution order, session store consistency. Propose a fix strategy and explain how you would verify it.
